pi_items.source: Verified by reading task.json description, verifier.py, and export_result.sh which explicitly require this exact protocol name to be created.

privileged_info_summary: The task explicitly requires the agent to create a new protocol named 'Western Blot Analysis v2' within the SciNote web application. This exact name is verified as the required target string checked by both export_result.sh database queries and the verifier.py script.
